function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "dispatch_armed_guard", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.3, "adjustment_reasons": ["Hand-set prior with n=0 carries no data weight — weak starting point", "Raw data shows 'background:true' suggesting secondary/non-critical door", "Zero precedents at this site — no evidence to support the default prior"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.5, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If guard arrives on scene and reports the door is intact and secured (no forced entry visible), I would downgrade to E1/E0. If video analytics or nearby sensors corroborate an intruder (motion after the door event), I would escalate toward E4."}
